title: Lucky Cat Mahjong
description: Lucky Cat Mahjong brings the joy of Hong Kong mahjong to offices and private lessons. Learn, play, and connect with us.

hero.headline: Hong Kong Mahjong in NYC
hero.subheadline: From private lessons to office workshops to curated brand collaborations, we make mahjong easy and unforgettable.

about.heading: About Lucky Cat Mahjong
about.body:
Lucky Cat Mahjong was founded by Jorge Yau and Sophia Huang on November 2025 with a simple goal: make mahjong accessible and build a thriving third-space community around it. Every month, we organize two free community events: a large social gathering open to the public, and an exclusive mahjong invitational tournament at a special location to recognize and celebrate our most active and deserving members. 

We specialize in organizing Hong Kong mahjong events and teaching fundamentals, points, and strategy. Whether you're picking up tiles for the first time or looking to level up, our sessions will give you the skills and confidence to sit down at any table.

cta.heading: Ready to play?
cta.body: Follow us on Instagram for upcoming events and community highlights — or reach out to book your next session. We're most active on Instagram.
